mapper.select: SELECT * FROM nx_machine_paper_refill_record WHERE nx_prr_device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY nx_prr_create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nx_machine_paper_refill_record ( nx_prr_device_id, nx_prr_before_count, nx_prr_add_count, nx_prr_after_count, nx_prr_waste_count, nx_prr_operator_id, nx_prr_operator_name, nx_prr_refill_type, nx_prr_remark, nx_prr_create_time ) VALUES ( #{nxPrrDeviceId}, #{nxPrrBeforeCount}, #{nxPrrAddCount}, #{nxPrrAfterCount}, #{nxPrrWasteCount}, #{nxPrrOperatorId}, #{nxPrrOperatorName}, #{nxPrrRefillType}, #{nxPrrRemark}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nx_machine_paper_refill_record WHERE nx_prr_id IN
#{nxPrrId}
